  (: recur-until-flip-true 
    (-> Number Bool))
;;; set constant here for max
  (= 
    (recur-until-flip-true $n) 
    (if 
      (> $n 40) False 
      (if 
        (flip) True 
        (recur-until-flip-true (+ 1 $n)))))
  (: recur-until-flip-false 
    (-> Number Bool))
;;; set constant here for max
  (= 
    (recur-until-flip-false $n) 
    (if 
      (> $n 40) False 
      (if 
        (flip) 
        (recur-until-flip-false (+ 1 $n)) True)))
  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (recur-until-flip-true 1) 
    (True))

[

;
;; HYPERON-METTALOG-SANITY.FLIP-TEST.01

; 
; EVAL TEST
; took 0.001 secs. (1.21 milliseconds) 

  !(assertEqualToResult 
    (recur-until-flip-true 1) 
    (True))

  (loonit_success  
    (equal_enough_for_test  
      (True) 
      (True)))


  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_5502))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqualToResult 
          (recur-until-flip-true 1) 
          (True)) $_3492) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_3780) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3492 $_3808) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3320) $_3808)))))




  (= (error  (existence_error  procedure (/  trace_on_pass 0)) (context  (:  system (/   1)) $_5502))  
    (,  
      (eval_H  500 &self 
        (assertEqualToResult 
          (recur-until-flip-true 1) 
          (True)) $_3492) 
      (,  
        (deterministic  $_3780) 
        (,  
          (xform_out  $_3492 $_3808) 
          (nb_setarg  1 
            (res  $_3320) $_3808)))))
